{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of Whispering Wind
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[The Script Lord]] is on the [[Path of Whispering Wind]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
